name: default-legal-review-playbook
description: Starter playbook for first-pass internal review. Replace with organization-specific positions before legal reliance.

positions.title: Limitation of Liability
positions.guidance: Escalate uncapped or asymmetric liability positions and confirm whether the cap matches the team's standard.

positions.title: Indemnification
positions.guidance: Flag unilateral or unlimited indemnity and verify whether the obligation is limited to third-party claims.

positions.title: Data Protection
positions.guidance: Confirm DPA coverage, deletion/return duties, breach notice timing, and subprocessors when personal data appears.

positions.title: Term and Termination
positions.guidance: Verify notice period, renewal mechanics, and whether termination for convenience is available.

positions.title: Governing Law
positions.guidance: Confirm governing law and venue match the team's accepted jurisdictions.
